title: anemone pratensis subsp. rubra
intro: Anemone pratensis subsp. rubra, also known as the redthimble or red wood anemone, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family, Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Anemone pratensis subsp. rubra are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
